description_long: This is a mid-20th-century, twin-engine propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a conventional tail design. The aircraft features a low-wing configuration with straight wings and rounded wingtips, and the engines are mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller. The fuselage is painted primarily light gray with a distinctive orange band around the rear section and roundel insignias on the wings and fuselage, suggesting military or governmental use. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with multiple windows for visibility. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear, all of which are extended. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail assembly.
description: A twin-propeller, low-wing airplane with a streamlined gray fuselage, orange rear band, and military roundels, featuring a tricycle landing gear and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, the orange rear band, both engines with propellers, and the roundel insignias on the wing and fuselage.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose, cockpit windows, both propellers, and the tricycle landing gear with the main and nose wheels visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the fuselage, engines, and tail, with roundels and the orange band clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail assembly, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan with both engines and landing gear visible.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and rounded wingtips, no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units under the wings and a single nose gear, all extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
